description: '''Folktronica''' is a genre of [[Electronic music#Indie electronic|indie electronic]] music incorporating elements of [[Contemporary folk music|folk music]] and [[electronica]], often featuring uses of [[acoustic instruments]] and incorporating delicate, textural [[sound design]]. ''The Ashgate Research Companion to Popular Musicology'' describes folktronica as "a catch-all [term] for all manner of artists who have combined mechanical dance beats with elements of acoustic rock or folk".
